reference: Yes, definitely. Kanchanar Guggul and Arogyavardhini Vati taken together will show results in about eight to twelve weeks. Take Kanchanar Guggul twice a day and Arogyavardhini Vati once a day. Avoid sour and heavy foods. Do deep breathing exercises – the Pranayama. Learn about this on International Yoga Day somewhere near you. It's a thirty-five-minute package and free. It's slow and longer but non-toxic. After eight weeks, continue with only Kanchanar Guggul to reach desired levels. It is totally safe and does not counteract with other medications. A lot of warm water is required with these. Write back happily when it starts reducing; it’s my experience. Hope it brings happiness to you – safely.
text: Yes, definitely. Kegginar, Google, and Arugiavar Nivati taken together will show results in about 8 to 12 weeks. Take Kegginar, Google twice a day and Arugiavar Nivati once a day. Avoid sour and heavy foods. Do deep breathing exercises. Pranayama. Learn about this on International Yoga Day somewhere near you. It's a 35-minute package and free. It's slow and longer but non-toxic. After 8 weeks, continue with only Kegginar, Google to reach desired levels. It is totally safe and does not counteract with other medications. A lot of warm water is required with these. Write back happily when it starts reducing. It's my experience. Hope it brings happiness to you. Safely.
